disambiguated.context: I've spent weeks conducting a survey targeting speakers of different varieties of English, and the last two calls I had to make today were to a farm worker and a scientist. I had a great conversation with the scientist, who was very helpful, but I had so much trouble understanding what the farm worker was saying that I just gave up after about two minutes.
disambiguated.question: Who has poor English skills?

final.reason: The speaker explicitly states they had trouble understanding the farm worker and gave up the call, implying the farm worker's English was difficult to comprehend.
